results.title: Sports Memories: Who was listed on the ‘Who’s Who in Sports’ 60 years ago?
results.description: I enjoy hearing from readers of my column, and this week one of them asked me to take a look back at 60 years ago. To honor their request, I am writing about what happened in early June of 1966.

results.title: Marlins beat the Pirates 8-3 for their 6th straight victory
results.description: Owen Caissie had a two-run double to cap a four-run seventh inning and the Miami Marlins beat the Pittsburgh Pirates 8-3 on Friday night for their sixth straight victory. Sandy Alcantara (6-4) won for the third time in three starts...
